name: Admin Tester
job_description:
AI/ML Engineer

This role involves designing, developing, and deploying cutting-edge AI/ML solutions and intelligent applications. You will be instrumental in building scalable systems that leverage the latest advancements in machine learning and large language models.

Key Responsibilities:
*   Develop, test, and deploy AI/ML models and pipelines using Python.
*   Design and implement LLM-powered applications using LangChain and LangGraph.
*   Build high-performance APIs with FastAPI to integrate ML services.
*   Manage and deploy AI/ML solutions on cloud platforms.
*   Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and deliver product features.

Required Skills:
*   Proficiency in Python programming.
*   Hands-on experience with LangChain and LangGraph.
*   Strong knowledge of FastAPI for API development.
*   Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
*   Solid understanding of machine learning principles.
screening_reason: Pre-screened admin tester account for convenient end-to-end evaluation.
resume_text: Admin Tester Resume: Expert in Python, FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, Generative AI, Deep Learning, and Machine Learning.

name: kiran gajjana
screening_reason: Kiran, your resume is an outstanding match for the AI/ML Engineer role! You demonstrate strong proficiency in Python, FastAPI, and cloud platforms like Azure AI/ML, which are core requirements. Your hands-on experience with LangChain, LangGraph, Generative AI, Deep Learning, NLP, and Computer Vision, coupled with practical project experience in building and deploying LLM-powered applications, makes you an exceptionally strong candidate. We are very impressed with your background and are excited to invite you to the next MCQ round!
red_flags: Short tenure in current role (Associate Software Engineer, Jan 2024 - present)

screening_reason: We are absolutely thrilled to see your application! Your resume showcases an impressive background as an AI/ML Engineer with direct experience in many of the core technologies we're looking for. Your proficiency in Python, FastAPI, LangChain, and LangGraph, coupled with your hands-on experience in deploying AI/ML solutions on Azure AI, makes you a fantastic fit for this role. We're particularly excited about your work with generative AI, NLP, computer vision, and your strong research background in deep learning and adversarial attacks. Your project experience, including building AI-powered copilots and custom vision models, demonstrates practical application of these skills. We believe your expertise will be a valuable asset, and we're eager to see you advance to the next stage!
red_flags: Short tenure in current role (January 2024 - present)

mcqs.question: What does the acronym "AI" primarily stand for in the field of technology?
Which of the following best describes the main goal of Machine Learning?
options: To enable computers to learn from data without explicit programming
mcqs.correct_option: To enable computers to learn from data without explicit programming

mcqs.question: Deep Learning is a specialized area within Machine Learning that is most closely associated with which type of model?
What is Python commonly used for in the context of AI and Machine Learning?
options: Writing scripts for data processing and model development
mcqs.correct_option: Writing scripts for data processing and model development

mcqs.question: Which of these is a fundamental task in Computer Vision?
options: Recognizing objects in images or videos
mcqs.correct_option: Recognizing objects in images or videos

mcq_answers.1: To enable computers to learn from data without explicit programming
mcq_answers.3: Writing scripts for data processing and model development
mcq_answers.4: Recognizing objects in images or videos
